newTask.title: New Task
newTask.subtitle: Describe what you want to build
newTask.titlePlaceholder: Be specific about what you want to accomplish
newTask.descriptionPlaceholder: Add more context, requirements, or constraints (optional)
newTask.autonomousDescription: When enabled, AI will automatically move the task through the workflow without waiting for manual approval at each stage.
newTask.autonomousWarning: AI will execute code changes automatically. Review changes carefully before merging.
newTask.workflowDescription: Your task will flow through brainstorming → planning → execution → review. Enable autonomous mode for hands-free execution.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.subtitle: These actions are irreversible. Please proceed with caution.
dangerZone.exportDescription: Download all your tasks, executions, and settings
dangerZone.disconnectDescription: Remove all connected repos. Tasks will be preserved.
dangerZone.disconnectConfirmMessage: This action will disconnect all repositories from Loopforge. Your task data will be preserved, but repository connections will be removed.
dangerZone.activeTasksMessage: You have {count} active or executing tasks. Disconnecting repositories may cause these tasks to fail.
dangerZone.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
dangerZone.deleteConfirmMessage: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
dangerZone.deletionWarning: ⚠️ This will immediately and permanently delete:

disconnectRepos.title: Disconnect All Repositories

disconnectRepos.confirmDescription: This action will disconnect all repositories from Loopforge. Please review what will happen:
disconnectRepos.activeWarningMessage: Any tasks currently in brainstorming, planning, or executing status will be stopped. Incomplete work may be lost.
disconnectRepos.canReconnect: You can reconnect repositories at any time, but execution history will not be restored.

dangerZone.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
dangerZone.confirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. Your account and all data will be permanently deleted.

dangerZone.dataLoss: All data will be permanently lost

integrationsPage.aiProvidersDescription: Configure API keys and select models for AI-powered tasks. Your keys are encrypted and stored securely.
integrationsPage.defaultProviderDescription: This provider will be used for brainstorming, planning, and executing tasks
integrationsPage.disconnectConfirmDescription: This will remove the repository from Loopforge Studio.
integrationsPage.activeTasksWarning: {count, plural, one {1 active task} other {# active tasks}} will fail if you disconnect now.
integrationsPage.tasksWillFail: Active tasks using this repo will fail
integrationsPage.branchesPreserved: Branches and commits in GitHub remain unchanged
integrationsPage.canReconnect: You can reconnect this repository later
integrationsPage.webhooksDescription: Configure webhooks to notify external services when tasks complete or encounter errors.

workflowPage.cloneDirectoryDescription: Where repositories are cloned on your local machine. Use ~ for home directory.
workflowPage.directoryWillBeCreated: Directory will be created on first clone
workflowPage.pleaseEnterValid: Please enter a valid directory path

defaultBehaviors.title: Default Behaviors
defaultBehaviors.description: These defaults apply when creating new automated tasks and branches.
defaultBehaviors.branchPrefixHint: We normalize the prefix to end with / when saving.
defaultBehaviors.requirePlanApprovalHint: When enabled, execution waits until a plan is explicitly approved.

review.title: Review Automation Configuration
review.description: Confirm each step is configured before saving.

workflowPage.testDefaultsDescription: These settings will be used for new repositories. Existing repositories keep their current configuration.

testDefaults.title: Default Test Configuration
testDefaults.description: These settings will be used for new repositories. Existing repositories keep their current configuration.
testDefaults.commandDescription: Command to run tests (e.g., npm test, yarn test, pytest)
testDefaults.timeoutDescription: Maximum time to wait for tests to complete
testDefaults.gatePolicyDescription: How to handle test results before creating pull requests

policy.strict: Strict - Block PR if tests fail

gatePolicyOptions.strict: Strict - Block PR if tests fail
gatePolicyOptions.strictDescription: Pull requests will not be created if any tests fail
gatePolicyOptions.warnDescription: Create PR even if tests fail, but add a warning comment
gatePolicyOptions.skipDescription: Tests are run but results don't affect PR creation
gatePolicyOptions.autoApproveDescription: Tests run for logging purposes only

testDefaults.noDefaultsMessage: Configure test defaults to automatically apply them to new repositories.

hero.headline: Ship code while you sleep
hero.subheading: Loopforge Studio lets you brainstorm, plan, and execute coding tasks with AI—while you focus on what matters.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need to ship faster
features.sectionSubtitle: The only platform that combines task management, AI assistance, autonomous code execution, and a visual workflow—all in one place.

visualKanban.title: Visual Kanban Board
visualKanban.description: Drag and drop tasks through a 7-stage workflow. From brainstorm to done, every step is visible and trackable.

aiBrainstorming.title: AI Brainstorming
aiBrainstorming.description: Chat with AI before execution. Refine requirements, explore approaches, and get the plan right before any code is written.

liveExecutionLogs.title: Live Execution Logs
liveExecutionLogs.description: Watch AI think, code, and commit in real-time. Full streaming terminal output with syntax highlighting.

directGitIntegration.title: Direct Git Integration
directGitIntegration.description: AI commits directly to your working branches. PRs can be created automatically (optional) or manually. You review and approve all changes before merging—maintaining full control.

multiAiProviders.title: Multi-AI Providers
multiAiProviders.description: Claude, GPT-4, Gemini—choose your preferred AI model for each task.

cloudHosted.title: Cloud-Hosted Platform
cloudHosted.description: Fully managed SaaS infrastructure. Bring your own API keys for complete control over AI costs.

analyticsDashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
analyticsDashboard.description: Track task completion, AI usage, and team productivity metrics.

githubOauth.title: GitHub OAuth
githubOauth.description: One-click authentication. Connect your repositories instantly.

cta.headline: Ready to ship code on autopilot?
cta.subheading: Join developers who are shipping faster with AI-powered autonomous coding.
cta.disclaimer: Free tier available. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: Visual Kanban interface for autonomous AI coding. Ship code while you sleep.
footer.copyright: Made with ❤️ by the Loopforge team. © {year} Loopforge Studio. All rights reserved.

integrations.sectionTitle: Powered by the best AI models
integrations.sectionSubtitle: Choose your preferred AI provider. Switch models per task for optimal results.

comparison.title: Why teams choose Loopforge
comparison.subtitle: The only platform that combines task management, AI assistance, autonomous code execution, and a visual workflow—all in one place.

taskManagement.title: Task Management
taskManagement.description: Organize and track your development workflow

aiExecutesCode.title: AI Executes Code
aiExecutesCode.description: AI writes and commits code autonomously

visualWorkflow.title: Visual AI Workflow
visualWorkflow.description: Watch AI agents build your software in real-time

callout.prefix: Other tools help you track tasks or write code.
callout.suffix: shows you a complete visual workflow of AI agents building your software.

comparisonBento.title: Why teams choose Loopforge
comparisonBento.subtitle: The only platform that combines task management, AI assistance, autonomous code execution, and a visual workflow—all in one place.

callout.prefix: Other tools help you track tasks or write code.
callout.suffix: shows you a complete visual workflow of AI agents building your software.

featuresExpanded.sectionTitle: Everything you need to ship faster
featuresExpanded.sectionSubtitle: A complete visual interface for autonomous AI coding. No more command lines, no more context switching.

aiBrainstorming.title: AI Brainstorming Chat
aiBrainstorming.description: Multi-turn conversation to refine requirements. Explore approaches and clarify scope before any code is written.

diffPreview.title: Diff Preview & Approval
diffPreview.description: Review every AI-generated change before it's committed. See exactly what's being modified with visual diffs.

visualKanban.title: Visual Kanban Workflow
visualKanban.description: Drag-and-drop tasks through a 7-stage AI pipeline. From brainstorm to done, every step is visible.

taskDependencies.title: Task Dependencies
taskDependencies.description: Tasks block each other with auto-execute when unblocked. Build complex workflows with dependency chains.

rollbackSafety.title: Rollback Safety
rollbackSafety.description: Revert any AI execution with safety checks. One-click undo to restore your codebase to a previous state.

activityFeed.title: Activity Feed
activityFeed.description: Real-time event tracking for all AI actions. Full audit trail of commits, executions, and changes.

addAuth.title: Add user authentication
addAuth.description: Implement OAuth2 login with GitHub provider

rateLimit.title: API rate limiting
rateLimit.description: Add rate limits to auth endpoints
